prompt_text: Compare Leapsome and Lattice for run quarterly performance cycles and 360-degree feedback reviews
response:
# Leapsome vs Lattice: Quarterly Performance & 360 Feedback

## Performance Cycles

| Feature | Leapsome | Lattice |
|---------|----------|---------|
| **Cycle Setup** | Flexible templates; easy customization | Highly customizable workflows |
| **Timeline Management** | Good scheduling tools | Excellent deadline management |
| **Ease of Use** | More intuitive interface | Steeper learning curve initially |
| **Automation** | Basic reminders & workflows | Advanced automation options |

## 360-Degree Feedback

| Feature | Leapsome | Lattice |
|---------|----------|---------|
| **Reviewer Selection** | Simple nomination process | More granular controls |
| **Anonymous Feedback** | Yes, clearly implemented | Yes, flexible settings |
| **Question Libraries** | Good pre-built templates | Extensive customizable options |
| **Report Clarity** | Clean, readable reports | Detailed analytics dashboards |
| **Anonymity Protection** | Strong safeguards | Strong safeguards |

## Key Differences

### Leapsome Strengths
- ✅ **Better for smaller teams** (easier onboarding)
- ✅ Cleaner, simpler UI
- ✅ Good mobile experience
- ✅ Faster implementation

### Lattice Strengths
- ✅ **Better for enterprises** (more scalability)
- ✅ Advanced reporting & analytics
- ✅ Deeper integration ecosystem
- ✅ More workflow customization
- ✅ Superior data visualization

## Quick Verdict

| Use Case | Winner |
|----------|--------|
| Mid-market, simplicity-first | **Leapsome** |
| Enterprise, advanced analytics | **Lattice** |
| Faster rollout | **Leapsome** |
| Complex compliance needs | **Lattice** |

**Would you like me to detail pricing, integration options, or specific workflow scenarios?**
